core_mechanism: variational Rayleigh-quotient minimization with successive deflation to count the dimension of the null space (kernel) of a Laplacian operator — extracting the number of zero eigenvalues (a topological/spectral invariant) by iteratively finding mutually orthogonal minimizers rather than by direct diagonalization
brief_reason: The abstract recasts null-space counting of combinatorial Laplacians as a continuous Rayleigh-quotient minimization with variational deflation to recover Betti numbers (kernel dimension) scale by scale, which is exactly a deflation-based variational eigen/null-space extraction of a spectral invariant.
